title: TitanPRO™ Crown Back Banquet Chair - Silver Vein Frame - Navy Vinyl
features: Introducing the TitaPRO™ Crown Back Banquet Chair, a pinnacle of style, durability, and comfort for your special occasions.
Crafted with a sleek Silver Vein Frame, this chair not only exudes sophistication but also boasts a robust 18 gauge steel construction, making it the definition of commercial-grade seating.

Constructed with meticulous attention to detail, this chair features a plush vinyl upholstery in Navy or Black and provides a luxurious seating experience while also ensuring easy maintenance for long-lasting use.
With an overall height of 37'', a width of 17.5'', and a depth of 21', the TitanPRO™ Crown Back Banquet Chair from EventStable strikes the perfect balance between comfort and space efficiency.
The 19-inch seat height is ideal for various table settings, ensuring your guests are seated comfortably throughout the event.
Arriving fully assembled and stackable, each chair offers unparalleled convenience for event organizers.
Whether you're hosting a wedding, corporate function, or any special gathering, the ease of setup and storage makes this chair a go-to choice.

With a remarkable weight capacity of 500 lbs. and a lightweight design at just 15 lbs., these chairs effortlessly blend functionality and style, making them a must-have for any event where comfort and elegance are paramount.
Elevate your event experience with the TitanPRO™ Crown Back Banquet Chair – where durability meets sophistication, setting the stage for unforgettable moments.
Best of all, these stacking chairs ship free when you purchase 50+ or combine them in an order with other equipment over $5k!

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more
